title: döner kebab mod
description: a mod that adds Döner Kebab and all things that come in mind when you hear Kebab :D
body:
**I TAKE VERSION REQUESTS JUST DM ME ON MY DISCORD SERVER LINKED!**

This mod brings together everything that has to do with kebab.

Why should you download this mod? 
Who doesnt want to eat a Kebab with his Friend?



THIS MOD IS MADE WITH MCREATOR!!! tip: if you have any ideas, you can write them to me on discord (discord server linked user:cringeali)


So here are listet recipes for items but they will be ingame in future updates

Sunflower Oil:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Sunnflower + Glass Bottle in both hands -> right click Grindstone
</details>
Raw Fries:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
potato in crafting field
</details>
